visual_description: Two men sit side by side; the man on the left wears a white uniform with shoulder epaulettes, while the man on the right wears a light blue shirt and tie. A third man stands nearby with his arms crossed, watching a CRT television that displays a black‑and‑white CCTV feed of a hallway. The camera alternates between close‑ups of the seated men and the standing man as he observes the screen.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
